Refer & Earn

Earn 0.0001 ETH for every mint made through your referral link.

Share the generated link for the specified wallet address and earn a referral fee for each mint completed through your link.

The more mints, the higher your fee! Promote the collection with your link to maximize your referral earnings.

Wallet Address for Referral Fees:

Your wallet address is required to generate a referral link.
